description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, double-cutaway body finished in a pearlescent white with subtle hints of blue and purple. The neck is a striking turquoise color, contrasting with the natural wood finish of the headstock, which features six tuning pegs in a single row. The guitar is equipped with two visible pickups, a bridge, and a set of control knobs on the lower bout. The back of the guitar reveals a rectangular electronics cavity cover and a bolt-on neck construction. The body appears to be made of solid wood, while the hardware is metallic, and the fretboard is likely a synthetic or treated wood. This instrument is designed for performance and would be commonly found in urban environments such as music venues, street performances, or studios.
description: A modern electric guitar with a pearlescent white body, turquoise neck, and natural wood headstock, featuring dual pickups and metallic hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pearlescent body, turquoise neck, dual pickups, and control knobs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slim body thickness and the natural wood finish of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the electronics cavity cover, bolt-on neck joint, and the back contour of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the body’s edge and the alignment of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, natural wood finish, no visible logo
